spec_match.rationale: The page probes UA-CH platformVersion, checks arbitrary macOS versions, and now pairs each historical support cut with developer-facing impact text.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the free-form version check, generated reference rows, impact text, and clean page load.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The live checker now matches the feature-index promise and gives context for why each unsupported OS branch matters.

edge_cases.rationale: The previous impact-table gap is covered by timeline impact notes and a developer-facing impact column.

references.rationale: The added see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5077742779498496.

design_system.rationale: The new impact text and reference link use existing typography and associated form labels.

summary: Re-tested in Chrome Canary through chrome-devtools-mcp at /v151/chrome-will-remove-support-for-macos-12/os-support-checker/: 12.7.4 produced the unsupported verdict, eight impact rows and four timeline impacts rendered, the ChromeStatus link was present, and console/network output was clean.
